ORDER DETERMINING CLAIM OF EXEMPTION - GRANTED IN PART

LAW AND MOTION 302, INITIALLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION, PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO.'S HEARING ON THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF OLIVIA JOMOC IS GRANTED IN PART. THE SHERIFF IS INSTRUCTED TO WITHHOLD $100/MONTH FROM DEFENDANT'S EARNINGS TO SERVICE THE DEBT. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS INSTRUCTED TO RELEASE ANY FUNDS THAT IT IS HOLDING TO THE CREDITOR. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO CSR#8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jan-24-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Olivia M. Jomoc, T:415.283.9038, defendant/judgment debtor/claimant, appearing on her own behalf, on Court Call;
Steve Levy, Esq. of the LAW OFFICES OF STEVE LEVY, T:800.637.6922, for plaintiff/opposing party, on Court Call.

RULING: The Court's tentative ruling was contested and argued. After hearing, the Court takes DEFENDANT OLIVIA JOMOC'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
